COMMON_TOOLTIPS_DESCRIPTION: Disables several common tips such as: Block, Strength, Vulnerable, Weak, Dexterity, Exhaust, and Energy.
DISCONNECT_CONFIRMATION.body:
Your friends will not be able to keep playing and you will not be able to rejoin.

You can continue the run if the host reloads the saved game.
FASTMODE_DESCRIPTION: When on, combat actions and screen transitions will happen more quickly.
FEEDBACK_DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: Enter up to 500 characters of wonderful feedback here
FULLSCREEN_DESCRIPTION:
Toggle between Fullscreen and Windowed modes.
[blue]Note: This uses Borderless Fullscreen.[/blue]
INPUT_SETTINGS.STEAM_INPUT_DETECTED:
Steam Input Detected - Controller Rebinding Disabled
(Use Steam's controller settings instead)
LIMIT_FPS_IN_BACKGROUND_DESCRIPTION: Limits the frame rate when the game is not in focus.
LONG_PRESS_CONFIRMATION_DESCRIPTION: Certain actions, like ending a turn, require pressing the button for half a second.
MODDING_SCREEN.MOD_UNLOADED_DESCRIPTION: You cannot view the description for this mod unless it is loaded.
MODDING_SCREEN.PENDING_CHANGES_WARNING: Disabling/Enabling mods will only take effect after a restart.
MSAA_DESCRIPTION:
Fancy technology to make rotated images not look as jagged.
[blue]NOTE: High performance cost at 8x.[/blue]
RESET_GAMEPLAY_CONFIRMATION.body: Are you sure you want to reset all gameplay settings to default?
RESET_GRAPHICS_CONFIRMATION.body: Are you sure you want to reset all graphics settings to default?
SCREENSHAKE_DESCRIPTION: Adjust how much the screen moves when you attack or receive damage and other in-game actions.
SHOW_HAND_CARD_COUNT_DESCRIPTION: Shows the position of a card in your hand above the card.
SHOW_RUN_TIMER_DESCRIPTION: Displays the Timer in the top bar all the time.
SKIP_INTRO_LOGO_DESCRIPTION: Takes you straight to the main menu when the game is started.
TEXT_EFFECTS_DESCRIPTION: Controls whether text effects, such as wavy or shaky text, are enabled.
TOAST_FAST_MODE_OFF: Combat actions and screen transitions will be slower.
TOAST_FAST_MODE_ON: Combat actions and screen transitions will be faster.
TOAST_GAMEPLAY_DATA_OFF: Gameplay metrics and error logs will not be uploaded.
TOAST_GAMEPLAY_DATA_ON: Gameplay metrics and error logs will be sent to Mega Crit.
TOAST_HAND_CARD_COUNT_OFF: Numbers will not be shown above cards in combat.
TOAST_HAND_CARD_COUNT_ON: Numbers will now be shown above cards in combat.
TOAST_MUTE_IN_BACKGROUND_OFF: The game will now play sound even if unfocused.
TOAST_MUTE_IN_BACKGROUND_ON: The game will no longer play any sound when unfocused.
TOAST_RUN_TIMER_OFF: Run Timer will only be shown when the run is paused.
TOAST_RUN_TIMER_ON: Run Timer now always shown during a run.
TOAST_SKIP_INTRO_LOGO_OFF: Mega Crit logo will be shown when opening the game.
TOAST_SKIP_INTRO_LOGO_ON: Mega Crit logo will no longer be shown when opening the game.
TOAST_WINDOW_RESIZING_OFF: The game window can no longer be resized.
TOAST_WINDOW_RESIZING_ON: The game window can now be resized.
TUTORIAL_RESET_POPUP_DESCRIPTION:
This will reset all of the tutorials and tip popups.

Useful if you haven't played in a very long time.
UPLOAD_GAMEPLAY_DATA_DESCRIPTION:
Gameplay data and error logs are sent to Mega Crit to fix bugs and balance the game.

Personally identifying information is NOT collected.
WINDOW_RESIZE_DESCRIPTION: Allows you to resize the game window by dragging its edges.
